paras.text: Library ke corridor me bheed thi. {{A}} apni assignment ki file sambhaalte hue jaldi me tha, tabhi kisi se takra gaya — files bikhar gayi.

paras.speaker: B
paras.text: (gusse me) Dekh ke nahi chal sakte kya?

paras.speaker: A
paras.text: Sorry sorry! Actually main... (files uthate hue) ...I should have watched my way, main soch raha tha assignment ke baare me.

paras.speaker: B
paras.text: (files uthate hue, thodi shant hoke) Arre wah — tumne 'should have' use kiya! Pata hai bahut log ye galat bolte hain, tum to nikle chhupe rustom.
Ek interview hall ke bahar wahi ladki file sambhaale khadi thi, jaise wahi purana din yaad aa raha ho...

quiz: Correct the error: 'If you would have called me, I would have come.'
Fill: If she ___ (study) harder, she ___ (pass) the exam.
Choose the correct sentence — a) If I would have known, I would have helped. b) If I had known, I would have helped.
